message:
Fix mission chat appending all responses into one bubble (#188)

The streaming handler appended every chunk to the last assistant message,
even when it was a NEW agent response after the previous one completed.
Adding a check for m.status === 'running' ensures that only mid-stream
chunks are appended; new responses create a separate chat bubble.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
